lines.speaker: Innkeeper
lines.text: The town is full tonight. Every room has already been taken.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there any place where they can rest?

lines.speaker: Innkeeper
lines.text: There is a stable behind the house. It is not much, but it is sheltered.

choices.text: I will make it ready for them.
I will find what they need first.

lines.speaker: Shepherd
lines.text: We were watching the flock when the night became bright around us.

lines.speaker: Shepherd
lines.text: We were told not to fear. Good news has come for all people.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then let us go and see what has happened.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.text: We have followed a sign in the heavens and seek the child born king.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The village is small, but tonight every road seems to lead toward wonder.
